title: Crafty Extra Recipes
description: Adds some extra recipes for otherwise uncraftable items, and adds a single new item (If you want it).
body:
This mod adds some extra recipes and a single item to the game (If you want it).

A lot of these are items that were previously uncraftable in a balanced way, while others are simply alternate ways to obtain existing items.

(Specific recipes are shown off in the Images section of this page, but JEI is recommended alongside this)



## Newly craftable items:

- Elytra

- End Portal Frame

- Enchanted Golden Apple

- Gilded Blackstone

- Chainmail Armor

- Bell

- Totem of Undying

- Iron Horse Armor

- Gold Horse Armor

- Diamond Horse Armor

- Saddle

- Name Tag

- Crying Obsidian

- Leather

- Trident

- Grass Block

- Warped Nylium

- Crimson Nylium

- Mycelium

- Bottle O' Enchanting

- Glow Berries

- Cobweb



## Items that can be uncrafted:

- Glowstone Dust

- Blaze Rod

- Cobweb



## New recipes for previously craftable items:

- Arrow



## New item:

- Shulker Core:

Has a 3.5% chance to drop from a Shulker (Unaffected by Looting).

Used to craft Elytras and applies Levitation I for 10 seconds (Like a Shulker Bullet would) when right-clicked. Has 100 durability.

When crafting Elytras with the "No Core" version, it's replaced with a Popped Chorus Fruit.

(Sprite in the Images section)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Misc. notes:

- You can break End Portal Frames by left-clicking with an End Rod. If there is a portal active, this will also destroy the portal itself. Be warned, if the frame has an eye, it will not be given back.

- There are two versions of this mod in 1.19.2 and 1.20.1: "Core" and "No Core." The only difference is that the former adds the Shulker Core whereas the latter removes it entirely.



### Items for consideration (Not currently in the mod):

- Gravel

- Sand

- Red Sand



(Feel free to suggest _reasonable_ items (No Dragon Egg or Nether Star recipes will ever be considered))



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



I know there are other mods like this out there, but I wanted to do my own version that would keep things relatively balanced while also giving the player more options for these harder-to-get items.

I made this for myself, but wanna share it with the world. :)
